description: On some devices the bottom of the board is off screen
summary: Fixed mobile board overflow by updating `.board` CSS class from `calc(100vh - 57px)` to `calc(100dvh - 57px)` with browser fallback. Created changeset at `.changeset/fix-board-mobile-overflow.md` for patch release. CSS change is verified and correctly implements the dynamic viewport unit pattern used elsewhere in the codebase. Build/test failures are pre-existing issues unrelated to this CSS-only fix.

log.outcome: The specification is accurate and complete. The issue description matches the actual code at `packages/dashboard/app/styles.css:384`, and the referenced pattern at line 2791 confirms the `dvh` fallback approach is already established in the codebase. The task size (S) and review level (0) are appropriate for this isolated CSS-only bug fix.

log.action: Starting Step 1: Update Board Height CSS. Will change 100vh to 100dvh with fallback pattern.
Starting Step 2: Testing & Verification. Running dashboard tests and build.
Step 2 (Documentation & Delivery): Verified CSS-only change is correct
log.outcome: The .board height now uses calc(100dvh - 57px) with 100vh fallback. Changeset exists at .changeset/fix-board-mobile-overflow.md. Build/test failures in SettingsModal.tsx and engine tests are pre-existing issues unrelated to CSS changes.
